description: CompositionBlack tunic made of lightweight, woven 100% viscose, has a mandarin collar, short sleeves with elasticated cuffs, pin-tucks on the front, half buttoned placket and embroidery above the hemFitRegularWash careRinse seperatelyGentle hand wash in mild detergentDo not bleachDo not scrub on embroidery and printLine dry inside outIron lowIt’s time to explore and discover new styles and get ready for freshness and summer outdoors with sepia. Stylish, girly and summery, this tunic is a must-have in your new season wardrobe. Pair this with form fitting jeans and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
